data.content:
Now I have a full picture of the build infrastructure. Here's my analysis:

---

## Build Infrastructure Review

### Issues Found

**1. No `Directory.Build.props` — Properties duplicated across all 5 projects:**
Every project repeats: `TargetFramework`, `Nullable`, `ImplicitUsings`, `TreatWarningsAsErrors`, `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild`, `Company`, `Authors`.

**2. No `Directory.Build.targets` — Custom target duplicated:**
The `PrintBuildInfo` target is copy-pasted in all 3 src projects.

**3. No Central Package Management (`Directory.Packages.props`):**
Package versions are managed per-project, causing version drift:
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions`: `8.0.0` in Core & Api, `8.0.1` in Services
- `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`: `17.10.0` vs `17.9.0`
- `xunit`: `2.8.1` vs `2.7.1`
- `xunit.runner.visualstudio`: `2.8.1` vs `2.5.6`

**4. `DocumentationFile` repeated** in all 3 src projects.

**5. Test boilerplate duplicated** — both test projects repeat the same testing package set and `IsPackable=false`.

---

### Recommended File Structure

```
/
├── Directory.Build.props          ← shared properties (all projects)
├── Directory.Build.targets        ← shared targets (src projects)
├── Directory.Packages.props       ← central package version management
├── src/
│   └── Directory.Build.props      ← src-specific (DocumentationFile)
├── test/
│   └── Directory.Build.props      ← test-specific (IsPackable, test packages)
```

---

### Proposed Files

**`/Directory.Build.props`** — eliminates 6 duplicated lines × 5 projects:
```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

**`/Directory.Packages.props`** — centralizes all versions, enables CPM:
```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <!-- Test packages -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**`/src/Directory.Build.props`** — src-only properties:
```xml
<Project>
  <Import Project="$([MSBuild]::GetPathOfFileAbove('Directory.Build.props', '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)../'))" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

**`/Directory.Build.targets`** — shared targets:
```xml
<Project>
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

**`/test/Directory.Build.props`** — test-only defaults:
```xml
<Project>
  <Import Project="$([MSBuild]::GetPathOfFileAbove('Directory.Build.props', '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)../'))" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" />
    <PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

---

### Result: Simplified Project Files

After applying these changes, the individual `.csproj` files become minimal:

| Project | Current lines | After |
|---------|:---:|:---:|
| Core | 26 | ~7 (sdk + 2 PackageReferences) |
| Services | 30 | ~10 (sdk + references) |
| Api | 32 | ~12 (sdk + references) |
| Core.Tests | 25 | ~8 (sdk + ProjectReference) |
| Api.Tests | 25 | ~8 (sdk + ProjectReference) |

---

### Additional Recommendations

1. **Align `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions`** to `8.0.1` (Services is ahead; Core & Api are stale).
2. **Consider replacing `Newtonsoft.Json`** in Services with `System.Text.Json` (already used in Core & Api) to reduce dependencies.
3. **Add a `global.json`** at the repo root to pin the .NET SDK version for reproducible builds.
4. **Add solution folders** in the `.sln` to group `src/` and `test/` projects visually.

Would you like me to implement these changes?
